sentences.translationEn: Hassan needed to charge his phone.

sentences.arabic: بَحَثَ عَنِ الشَّاحِنِ فِي حَقِيبَتِهِ فَلَمْ يَجِدْهُ.
sentences.translation: Tražio je punjač u torbi ali ga nije pronašao.
sentences.translationEn: He looked for the charger in his bag but did not find it.

sentences.translation: Pitao je prijatelja i on mu je posudio punjač.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his friend and he lent him his charger.

sentences.translation: Zahvalio mu je i napunio telefon.
sentences.translationEn: He thanked him and charged his phone.
